en_title: Fantasy Tactical RPG Langrisser: Sea of Sword Announced with Debut Trailer
cn_title: 《梦幻模拟战：剑之海》公布首支预告片
subtitle: 迷雾大陆的暗潮
opus_summary: BlackJack Studio公布战术RPG新作《梦幻模拟战：剑之海》，游戏将登陆移动端、Steam和PC。新作延续小队战斗与分支剧情，并以更黑暗的权力斗争为主线，由西木康智负责配乐。

paragraphs.en: Developer BlackJack Studio revealed the next game in the long-running Langrisser RPG franchise with a debut teaser trailer on Thursday. Titled Langrisser: Sea of Sword, it marks a next-generation leap for the series. It’s releasing globally on iOS, Android, Steam, and PC and is officially open for pre-registration now.
paragraphs.cn: 开发商BlackJack Studio周四发布首支预告片，公布了长寿RPG系列《梦幻模拟战》的下一款作品。新作名为《梦幻模拟战：剑之海》，标志着该系列向次世代迈进。游戏将在全球登陆iOS、Android、Steam和PC，目前已正式开放预注册。

paragraphs.en: The Langrisser series has been going strong for 35 years now and is known for its squad-based tactical battles and branching story paths. Langrisser: Sea of Sword builds on that foundation, but the story takes the series in a darker, more intense direction. Bucking the series’ recent trend of bright and straightforward heroic adventures, the new installment instead focuses on the clash of factions and struggle for power, where fates of whole nations hang in the balance and your decisions can shape the course of fate.
paragraphs.cn: 《梦幻模拟战》系列至今已走过35年，以小队战术战斗和分支剧情路线闻名。《梦幻模拟战：剑之海》在这一基础上继续发展，但故事将系列带向更加黑暗、激烈的方向。新作一改系列近来明快直白的英雄冒险风格，转而聚焦阵营冲突与权力争夺：整个国家的命运悬于一线，而玩家的选择能够改变命运走向。

paragraphs.en: You play as a nameless protagonist trying to regain their lost memories while traveling with a mysterious white-haired girl across a continent shrouded in the Sea of Mists. The teaser trailer gives us a glimpse at the game's darker tone, with images of discarded weapons and armor strewn across a beach as if leftover from a bloody battle. Then we see sun-drenched city streets and castles, which are replaced by decaying underwater remnants.
paragraphs.cn: 玩家将扮演一名无名主角，与一位神秘白发少女结伴穿越被「迷雾之海」笼罩的大陆，同时试图找回失去的记忆。预告片展现了游戏更为阴暗的基调：废弃的武器和盔甲散落海滩，仿佛是一场血战留下的残骸。随后，阳光照耀的城市街道与城堡映入眼帘，又被水下腐朽的遗迹取代。

paragraphs.en: Official sources told IGN that the game’s soundtrack was composed by renowned RPG composer Yasunori Nishiki, who’s built a strong reputation for his sweeping orchestral compositions. He’s perhaps best known for being the lead composer of the Octopath Traveler series, for which he was nominated for Best Music at The Game Awards. He’s also contributed arrangements to the Final Fantasy VII Remake series, Kingdom Hearts III, and Granblue Fantasy Versus.
paragraphs.cn: 官方消息人士向IGN透露，游戏配乐由知名RPG作曲家西木康智创作，他凭借气势恢宏的管弦乐作品赢得了良好声誉。他最广为人知的身份或许是《歧路旅人》系列的首席作曲家，并曾凭该系列获TGA最佳音乐奖提名。此外，他还参与了《最终幻想7 重制版》系列、《王国之心3》和《碧蓝幻想Versus》的编曲工作。

paragraphs.en: Nishiki is far from the only experienced member of the creative team. Development is being run by BlackJack Studio, the team that also developed Langrisser Mobile, the series’ most recent title in 2018 that’s still being supported to this day. But since it’s been several years since the release of the previous title, you can bet on Sea of Sword seeing a significant leap in graphical fidelity.
paragraphs.cn: 西木康智远非创作团队中唯一经验丰富的成员。开发工作由BlackJack Studio主导，该团队也曾开发《梦幻模拟战》手游——这款2018年推出的系列最新作至今仍在持续运营。不过，距离上一部作品发行已经过去数年，因此《梦幻模拟战：剑之海》的画面精细度势必会有显著提升。

paragraphs.en: While the graphics have improved, they haven’t replaced the hand-painted anime art style the series is known for. We get a brief look at characters at the end of the trailer, where it will be clear to fans of the series that character designs are still consistent with the ones they know and love. They’re just more detailed now.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然画面有所提升，但系列标志性的手绘动漫美术风格并未被取代。预告片结尾短暂展示了几名角色，系列粉丝一眼便能看出，角色设计依然延续了他们熟悉并喜爱的风格，只是如今细节更加丰富。

pending_dict.reason: 新作副标题中文译名尚待官方确认
通行中文名尚未收录于词库
